productDisplayName: Nike Men Legend White Casual Shoe
description: Designed for heavyweight Basketball players like Patrick Ewing, the nike Legend is truely a legendary basketball sneaker that comes in a simple design but packed with sneaker technologies that make it a comfortable footwear. It was, in fact, the first basketball shoe to feature a perforated toe box to offer exemplary breathable comfort. Upper Synthetic leather upper with nike swoosh overlays on either side of the midfoot for style Perforated toe box for breathable comfort Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and collar for a snug comfort Cushioned footbed for enhanced cushioning and impact protection Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Midsole Phylon midsole for absolute shock absorption and lightweight comfort Outsole TPR outsole with herringbone grooves for optimum grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
